sections.title: Overview
sections.content: The onboarding process helps new employees become familiar with the company, its policies, systems, and work environment. It ensures a smooth transition into their new role.

sections.title: Employee Responsibilities
content: Ask questions whenever clarification is needed.

sections.title: Best Practices
content: Complete all onboarding tasks on time.

content.question: When does onboarding begin?
content.answer: The onboarding process usually begins on your first working day.

content.question: Who should I contact if I have onboarding questions?
content.answer: Contact the HR department or your direct manager.

content.question: What if I am missing a required document?
content.answer: Inform HR as soon as possible so they can advise you.
